title: Unicode, Language, Tokenization, Fields, and Citation Offsets
description: A search service lowercases and compatibility-normalizes every field, tokenizes all languages on spaces, removes legal negation as a stop word, and can no longer link a hit to its source span. Learners cumulatively produce reversible multilingual text pipeline through theory, guided work, debugging, transfer, retrieval, and assessment.
objectives: Choose and version Unicode normalization per field while retaining original text and testing canonical and compatibility distinctions.
Detect or receive language and apply language- and script-appropriate word, subword, character, or morphological tokenization.
Separate title, heading, body, code, identifier, date, author, tenant, and access metadata with explicit weighting and filter semantics.
